title: Verdict
description: A single verdict object returned by a judge instance. Three judge instances run per refutation; a 2-of-3 majority decides. On unrecoverable failure, the judge returns an error-form object.

verdict.description: 'upheld' if the refutation is supported by transcript evidence; 'rejected' otherwise.

reason.description: One sentence explaining the decision, citing the specific span or the absence of one.

error.description: Short description of the unrecoverable failure.
